plugins.name: office-file-api
plugins.description: DevExpress Office File API skills: Spreadsheet, Word Processing, PDF, Presentation, Barcode, Unit Conversion, Excel Export, Zip, and AI-Powered Extensions for headless .NET document automation.

plugins.name: reporting
